transcript.text: Hello, hello, hello, living in Lafayette vlog. I just showed up at my mama house because I'm going to have a barbecue here with my brothers and my mama. I figured I'd do my living in the Lafayette vlog first.

Um, yesterday I spent all day, uh, uh, well I had to rename some CSS stuff and then plugging in CSS. That was all day. Um, and experimenting with the, uh, the top, the, uh, the drop-down menu. I think I want to utilize drop-down menu to help explain my timeline.

But somebody pointed out that, yeah, you can't use them with touchscreens like cell phones and iPads. So I think I'll have it both ways. Um, but, um, but yeah, I was working, dude, like until like four 30 in the morning, man, I was working until I heard my roommate get up to go to work.

And, um, uh, so then I, but then I, because I slept so much yesterday, like, cause I took that Unisom and I pretty much didn't wake up all day yesterday. Those Unisoms fuck me up, man. I couldn't even talk. Um, I, um, and they're tiny little pills. Somebody said to take half of one. So yeah, I'll do that next time. But I, uh, yeah, but so I slept in until 10 30.

I got like four hours, six hours of sleep or something, but that was enough. I felt totally rested and went in to mow my friend's lawn, but, uh, he was there and he was like raining. He said to do it tomorrow. So, so, uh, so yeah, I'm going to hang out here and, um, rename CSS files on some of those pages before I paste the ones in there. Cause, um, you know, cause I haven't, so I don't have to reattach them again.

But, uh, my computer was acting weird and it wasn't wanting to rename them. So I restarted it and hopefully that'll work. Um, and once I do that, I think I'm going to go into all the other pages and just attach all of the ones that I can just to make it look as polished as I can, you know, before I add any new stuff. Um, I think that'll help my cause.

And, uh, yeah, window guys called me. They're going to have me start next week. So that's a good, I can start to pay my friend back. Um, and, um, but I won't be working as much on my timeline. So I don't know what's going to happen there.

Maybe I'll come home and, um, work on the timeline after work, or maybe I'll just abandon it altogether for the rest of the summer and then like be a normal person and I go biking and stuff when I come, you know, stretching and do the dumbbells and stuff when I come home.

So who knows what'll happen. I sure was loving not having to work there for that while working on my timeline all the time, but, uh, whatever, as long as you keep moving forward, you'll eventually get there.
And, uh, so that's, that's the 5th of June, 2013.
